hero.title: Discover recipes from around the world.
hero.description: Cook smarter, eat better, and explore new flavors every day.

home.featuredDescription: Approachable dishes with enough character to become a favourite.

recipes.title: All recipes
recipes.description: Search 24 carefully tested, globally inspired recipes.

favorites.title: Your saved recipes
favorites.description: Keep the dishes you want to cook close by.
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the heart on any recipe to build your personal cookbook.

categories.title: Recipe categories
categories.description: Find a dish for the moment, meal or mood.

cuisines.title: Cuisines of the world
cuisines.description: A compact collection of generous, regional cooking.

cuisineIntro.italian: Comforting classics built on excellent ingredients and simple technique.
cuisineIntro.french: Patient cooking, rich flavour and a little everyday ceremony.
cuisineIntro.georgian: Generous dishes with warm bread, cheese and bright herbs.
cuisineIntro.japanese: Clear, balanced flavours with deep attention to texture.
cuisineIntro.mexican: Vivid spice, fresh acidity and food made for sharing.
cuisineIntro.indian: Layered spices and flexible dishes that welcome the whole table.
cuisineIntro.mediterranean: Olive oil, vegetables and sunlit simplicity.
cuisineIntro.ukrainian: Soulful, seasonal cooking with generous bowls and bright dill.
cuisineIntro.latvian: Northern ingredients transformed with restraint and comfort.
cuisineIntro.american: Beloved comfort food, approachable and full of character.

about.title: Food worth making
about.intro: Misen is an editorial recipe library for everyday cooking with a little more intention.
about.philosophy: Use honest ingredients, learn a few reliable techniques, and make room at the table for people. Recipes are written to be useful first and beautiful second.
about.data: Recipe information is curated sample content for this demonstration. Nutrition values are approximate and are not medical advice.
about.images: Photography is loaded from Unsplash under its licence. Every image remains the property of its respective photographer.
about.accessibility: The interface uses semantic landmarks, clear focus states, responsive layouts and reduced-motion support.

footer.tagline: A considered collection of recipes for the curious cook.
